title: Item Pots (depreciated)
body:
With the release of 1.20.3 this datapack has become depreciated.

This data pack allows up to a stack of an [item](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Item) to be stored in [pots](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Decorated_Pot) by dropping them on top. A pot will only accept items once, unless it is broken and replaced, but can accept multiple of the same item if dropped together. The items will be stored till the pot is broken, upon which they will jump back out.
